$comment: scripts/FuchsiaGym.asm FuchsiaGymKogaText — challenge -> OPP_KOGA -> SOULBADGE + BEAT_KOGA + the gym's trainers defeated (gh #109) -> TM06. A full bag forfeits the TM for good (gh #174).

then.text:
A ninja must be
able to track his
foes through any
darkness. Hone your skills!

else.text:
KOGA: Fwahahaha! A mere child like
you dares to
challenge me? Very well, I
shall show you
true terror as a
ninja master!

then.text:
Humph!
You have proven
your worth! Here! Take the
SOULBADGE!

Now that you have
the SOULBADGE,
the DEFENSE of
your POKéMON
increases! It also lets you
use SURF outside
of battle! Ah! Take this
too!

TM06 contains
TOXIC! It badly poisons
the foe, dealing
more damage each
turn!
